name: Hue
description_en: Learn any brand and turn it into a complete, reusable design system.
description_zh: 学习任意品牌,并将其转化为完整、可复用的设计系统。
long_en: A skill that extracts a brand's visual language (color, type, spacing) and outputs a coherent design system an agent can apply consistently.
long_zh: 提取品牌视觉语言(色彩、字体、间距)并输出连贯设计系统的技能,供智能体一致地应用。
sec_note_en: Reads brand assets you provide; review fetched sources.
sec_note_zh: 读取你提供的品牌素材;请审阅抓取的来源。
